macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: S&P 500 Closes Down 0.39% Amid Parabolic Decline and Oversold Conditions
items.summary: The S&P 500 fell 25.13 points to 6,343.72 on Monday, March 30, dropping below key moving averages and entering oversold territory with RSI below 30, amid indiscriminate de-risking due to Iran conflict uncertainty. The index is gravitating toward 6100 support level, 200 points away.

items.title: Dow Edges Up 0.11% While Nasdaq Drops 0.73% in Mixed US Session
items.summary: US markets showed mixed performance on Monday: Dow Jones rose 49.50 points to 45,216.14, S&P 500 down 0.39% to 6,343.72, and Nasdaq fell 153.72 points to 20,794.64. Stocks failed to hold early gains amid broader de-risking.

items.title: European DAX Surges 1.18% as Global Markets Face Institutional Selling Pressure
items.summary: Germany's DAX closed up 262.13 points or 1.18% at 22,562.88, contrasting with battered global equities entering March's final session after five weeks of institutional selling. Asian markets opened mixed on Tuesday.

items.title: Global Equities End March Battered by Five Weeks of Institutional Selling
items.summary: Major indices closed the final trading session of March 2026 under pressure from prolonged institutional outflows, with S&P 500 unable to maintain gains and drifting lower. April's seasonally strong period seen as pivotal for trend reversal.

items.title: Asian Markets Open Mixed: Korea Down 2.53%, Australia Up 0.85%
items.summary: Early Tuesday trading saw Korea Composite drop 2.53%, Nikkei down 0.97%, while S&P/ASX 200 rose 0.85% and Hang Seng up 0.27%, reflecting varied regional responses amid global uncertainty.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: FTX Begins $2.2B Creditor Redistribution; FTT Token Surges 9%
items.summary: FTX initiated its long-awaited creditor redistribution program on March 31, 2026, returning $2.2 billion to affected parties. The FTT token responded with a 9% gain in 24-hour trading.

items.title: Bitcoin Holds $66,798 as Geopolitical Tensions Drive Market Volatility
items.summary: Bitcoin traded at $66,798.40 with a modest 1.19% gain, as geopolitical tensions continue to influence cryptocurrency market movements. The asset remains range-bound despite broader macro uncertainty.

items.title: Ethereum Climbs to $2,066 Amid Technical Analysis Warnings
items.summary: Ethereum rose 1.49% to approximately $2,066, though analysts warn of potential breakout or liquidation risks at current support levels. The price represents a recovery near the $2,000 psychological level.

items.title: Canton Network Sees Muted Price Reaction Despite $500M Digital Bond Program Launch
items.summary: T-RIZE launched a $500 million digital bond program on Canton Network, but CC token declined 2.63% in 24 hours despite multiple traditional institutions issuing bonds on the platform.

items.title: ONT Token Gains 5% on Strong Korean Trading Volume
items.summary: Ontology (ONT) surged 5% in the past 24 hours, with Korean capital accounting for over 40% of its trading volume, indicating strong regional interest.

items.title: EDGE Token Lists on March 31; OP Unlock Scheduled
items.summary: The edgeX protocol confirmed $EDGE token listing on March 31, while Optimism (OP) is set to unlock 1.55% of circulating supply, valued at approximately $3.2 million.

items.title: Lista DAO Proposes Tokenomics 2.0 to Phase Out veLISTA Model
items.summary: Lista DAO introduced Tokenomics 2.0 proposal aimed at phasing out the veLISTA model, though the LISTA token remained largely flat with a -0.57% 24-hour change.

items.title: SWIFT Blockchain Ledger Enters MVP Stage with Real Transactions Planned
items.summary: SWIFT's blockchain-based shared ledger project has reached minimum viable product (MVP) stage, with real transactions expected to begin later in 2026.

items.title: Strategy (MicroStrategy) Pauses Bitcoin Purchases After 13 Consecutive Weeks
items.summary: Strategy, the world's largest corporate Bitcoin treasury holder with 762,099 BTC worth $51.6 billion, did not purchase any Bitcoin during the March 23-29 week, ending a 13-week buying streak.

items.title: Nakamoto Sells ~$20M in Bitcoin to Build USD Reserves
items.summary: An entity identified as Nakamoto disclosed selling approximately $20 million in Bitcoin during March 2026 to increase USD reserve holdings.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Serious Insights Releases State of AI 2026 March Update
items.summary: The update highlights AI shifting to delegated systems, capability advances like Google's Gemini 3.1 Pro achieving 77.1% on ARC-AGI-2, model portfolio stratification, inference infrastructure battles, and growing deployment gaps outpacing model development.

items.title: Meta Tests Avocado 9B and Avocado Mango Agent Models
items.summary: Meta is experimenting with Avocado variants delayed to May, capable of complex math but lagging competitors; the company is routing some requests through Google's Gemini and considering licensing it.

items.title: AI in Fraud Management Market Report Forecasts Growth to 2035
items.summary: The market emphasizes real-time fraud detection, ML-based risk analytics, and adaptive systems; companies like Compass Plus launched AI-powered FraudAxis in September 2025 for enhanced prevention.
items.source: The Business Research Company via NatLawReview

items.title: AI SaaS Market Report Projects Expansion Through 2035
items.summary: Focus on scalable cloud AI platforms, ML deployment, and NLP; Microsoft led with 3% market share in 2024 via AI development tools and generative models.
items.source: The Business Research Company via EIN Presswire

items.title: Udacity Launches AWS AI & ML Scholars Program 2026
items.summary: Free global training program for aspiring AI and machine learning professionals to build in-demand tech skills.

items.title: Butterfly Network Secures FDA Clearance for AI Ultrasound Pregnancy Tool
items.summary: The AI tool provides fetal age estimates in under two minutes without image capture or measurements, advancing prenatal care.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Super Meat Boy 3D Launches Today on Xbox Game Pass
items.summary: The iconic platformer series makes its debut in full 3D on March 31, 2026, arriving day one on Xbox Game Pass alongside PlayStation 5 and PC releases. The game maintains the series' signature precision and high difficulty in its new three-dimensional format.

items.title: ARC Raiders Flashpoint Update Launches with New Content
items.summary: The free Flashpoint update for ARC Raiders releases today, introducing a new ARC called the Vaporizer, two new weapons (Dolabra Energy Shotgun and Canto Sub-machine gun), and expanded progression systems across all platforms.

items.title: Legacy of Kain: Ascendance Releases Today
items.summary: The fast-paced 2D action game launches on March 31, 2026 across PS5, Xbox Series S|X, Switch, Switch 2, and PC.

items.title: Star Wars Announces Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains
items.summary: Lucasfilm Games revealed a new Star Wars board game adaptation set to launch June 11, 2026 across multiple platforms. The full reveal is scheduled for April 29 as part of Star Wars' May the 4th celebrations.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Big Tech Selloff Signals Potential Market Turning Point
items.summary: Tech stocks experienced a significant selloff, with investors debating if it marks a turning point for the market. Meta's market cap dropped about $280 billion in March, its worst performance since October 2022.

items.title: NASA Prepares Artemis II Launch for Lunar Flyby
items.summary: NASA is gearing up for the Artemis II mission, paving the way for ambitious lunar ambitions and a return to the Moon.

items.title: SpaceX Targets Up to $75 Billion Blockbuster IPO
items.summary: Investors are eyeing SpaceX's potential mega $75 billion IPO and the impact of Elon Musk’s Terafab plan on the business.

items.title: Sysco Seals $29 Billion Acquisition of Jetro
items.summary: Sysco announced a massive $29 billion deal to acquire Jetro, amid broader market pressures and hedge fund pullbacks.
